title: Device Forensics: Cisco IOS — Live CLI
description: BR-EDGE-01 is still up. Connect to the device, run the same IOS commands you would in a real IR — show running-config, show users, show history, pipes — and reconstruct the attacker's changes.

hints.text: Start with `connect br-edge-01`. NOC creds — any user/password works. Then `enable` with the password from the briefing.
The attacker's commands are still in the vty line history buffer. `show history` after `enable`.
Pipes work: `show running-config | section interface Tunnel0`, `show running-config | include snmp`, `show running-config | include privilege`.
